benefits.description: At 5mg felt like mind was on go mode, knocking down tasks one after another, could keep doing more
Mentally, physically, and emotionally less exhausted compared to before

side_effects.description: Tolerance developed after 4-6 shots at 2.5mg, felt nothing

protocol_notes: Started at 2.5mg for first 1-2 shots with good effect, then tolerance developed over next 4-6 shots. Increased to 5mg standard dose. Currently 2x/week, considering 3x/week. On TRT 100mg/week since October 2025. Takes MOTS-C on same days as TRT injection (Monday and Thursday) for convenience. Considering MWF schedule.
